## рҹ“қ UVMйӘҢиҜҒжЁЎеһӢ

### I2C Transaction

```systemverilog
class i2c_transaction extends uvm_sequence_item;
    typedef enum {WRITE, READ} rw_e;

    rand rw_e read_write;
    rand bit [6:0] addr;
    rand bit [7:0] data[];
    int delay_cycles;

    `uvm_object_utils_begin(i2c_transaction)
        `uvm_field_enum(rw_e, read_write, UVM_ALL_ON)
        `uvm_field_int(addr, UVM_ALL_ON)
        `uvm_field_array_int(data, UVM_ALL_ON)
    `uvm_object_utils_end

    constraint data_size_c {
        data.size() inside {[1:256]};
    }
endclass
```

### I2C Driver

```systemverilog
class i2c_driver extends uvm_driver #(i2c_transaction);
    virtual i2c_if vif;

    task run_phase(uvm_phase phase);
        forever begin
            seq_item_port.get_next_item(req);
            drive_transaction(req);
            seq_item_port.item_done();
        end
    endtask

    task drive_transaction(i2c_transaction tr);
        vif.sda_drive(1'b1);
        vif.scl_drive(1'b1);

        // START
        @(posedge vif.scl);
        vif.sda_drive(1'b0);
        @(negedge vif.scl);

        // Address + R/W
        drive_byte({tr.addr, tr.read_write});

        // ACK
        drive_ack();

        // Data
        foreach (tr.data[i]) begin
            drive_byte(tr.data[i]);
            drive_ack();
        end

        // STOP
        @(negedge vif.scl);
        vif.sda_drive(1'b0);
        @(posedge vif.scl);
        vif.sda_drive(1'b1);
    endtask

    task drive_byte(bit [7:0] data);
        for (int i = 7; i >= 0; i--) begin
            @(negedge vif.scl);
            vif.sda_drive(data[i]);
        end
    endtask
endclass
```

93: ## рҹ“қ UVMйӘҢиҜҒжЁЎеһӢ
94: 
95: ### I2C Transaction
96: 
97: ```systemverilog
98: class i2c_transaction extends uvm_sequence_item;
99:     typedef enum {WRITE, READ} rw_e;
100: 
101:     rand rw_e read_write;
102:     rand bit [6:0] addr;
103:     rand bit [7:0] data[];
104:     int delay_cycles;
105: 
106:     `uvm_object_utils_begin(i2c_transaction)
107:         `uvm_field_enum(rw_e, read_write, UVM_ALL_ON)
108:         `uvm_field_int(addr, UVM_ALL_ON)
109:         `uvm_field_array_int(data, UVM_ALL_ON)
110:     `uvm_object_utils_end
111: 
112:     constraint data_size_c {
113:         data.size() inside {[1:256]};
114:     }
115: endclass
116: ```
117: 
118: ### I2C Driver
119: 
120: ```systemverilog
121: class i2c_driver extends uvm_driver #(i2c_transaction);
122:     virtual i2c_if vif;
123: 
124:     task run_phase(uvm_phase phase);
125:         forever begin
126:             seq_item_port.get_next_item(req);
127:             drive_transaction(req);
128:             seq_item_port.item_done();
129:         end
130:     endtask
131: 
132:     task drive_transaction(i2c_transaction tr);
133:         vif.sda_drive(1'b1);
134:         vif.scl_drive(1'b1);
135: 
136:         // START
137:         @(posedge vif.scl);
138:         vif.sda_drive(1'b0);
139:         @(negedge vif.scl);
140: 
141:         // Address + R/W
142:         drive_byte({tr.addr, tr.read_write});
143: 
144:         // ACK
145:         drive_ack();
146: 
147:         // Data
148:         foreach (tr.data[i]) begin
149:             drive_byte(tr.data[i]);
150:             drive_ack();
151:         end
152: 
153:         // STOP
154:         @(negedge vif.scl);
155:         vif.sda_drive(1'b0);
156:         @(posedge vif.scl);
157:         vif.sda_drive(1'b1);
158:     endtask
159: 
160:     task drive_byte(bit [7:0] data);
161:         for (int i = 7; i >= 0; i--) begin
162:             @(negedge vif.scl);
163:             vif.sda_drive(data[i]);
164:         end
165:     endtask
166: endclass
167: ```

## рҹ“қ UVMйӘҢиҜҒжЁЎеһӢ

### I2C Transaction

```systemverilog
class i2c_transaction extends uvm_sequence_item;
    typedef enum {WRITE, READ} rw_e;

    rand rw_e read_write;
    rand bit [6:0] addr;
    rand bit [7:0] data[];
    int delay_cycles;

    `uvm_object_utils_begin(i2c_transaction)
        `uvm_field_enum(rw_e, read_write, UVM_ALL_ON)
        `uvm_field_int(addr, UVM_ALL_ON)
        `uvm_field_array_int(data, UVM_ALL_ON)
    `uvm_object_utils_end

    constraint data_size_c {
        data.size() inside {[1:256]};
    }
endclass
```

### I2C Driver

```systemverilog
class i2c_driver extends uvm_driver #(i2c_transaction);
    virtual i2c_if vif;

    task run_phase(uvm_phase phase);
        forever begin
            seq_item_port.get_next_item(req);
            drive_transaction(req);
            seq_item_port.item_done();
        end
    endtask

    task drive_transaction(i2c_transaction tr);
        vif.sda_drive(1'b1);
        vif.scl_drive(1'b1);

        // START
        @(posedge vif.scl);
        vif.sda_drive(1'b0);
        @(negedge vif.scl);

        // Address + R/W
        drive_byte({tr.addr, tr.read_write});

        // ACK
        drive_ack();

        // Data
        foreach (tr.data[i]) begin
            drive_byte(tr.data[i]);
            drive_ack();
        end

        // STOP
        @(negedge vif.scl);
        vif.sda_drive(1'b0);
        @(posedge vif.scl);
        vif.sda_drive(1'b1);
    endtask

    task drive_byte(bit [7:0] data);
        for (int i = 7; i >= 0; i--) begin
            @(negedge vif.scl);
            vif.sda_drive(data[i]);
        end
    endtask
endclass
```
